name: PLS Check Cashers
description_short: At Oklahoma City, OK, PLS Check Cashers on South Pennsylvania Avenue operates round-the-clock check cashing services.
description_long:
Located at 7421 South Pennsylvania Avenue in Oklahoma City, OK, PLS Check Cashers is a standalone check-cashing facility open 24 hours a day, seven days a week. This South Pennsylvania location serves Oklahoma City residents and visitors seeking immediate cash access without bank delays.

PLS Check Cashers at this Oklahoma City location provides quick check cashing services, including personal checks, business checks, and government-issued checks. You can reach the South Pennsylvania Avenue store at +1 405-681-2108 to confirm current services or ask questions about documents needed.

For Oklahoma City residents who need cash quickly, this 24/7 check-cashing service on South Pennsylvania is convenient whether you have a checking account elsewhere or need an alternative to traditional banking. Bring a valid government-issued ID to complete your transaction.
address: 7421 S Pennsylvania Ave, Oklahoma City, OK 73159

company_info.headquarters: 7421 S Pennsylvania Ave, Oklahoma City, OK 73159

pros: Open 24/7 across all service categories — financial, transportation, and business
DMV-adjacent services (registration renewals, title transfers, license plates) available at Illinois locations
Ria Money Transfer partnership enables international remittances in-store
Xpectations! PLUS Debit Mastercard provides a prepaid card option for unbanked customers
Notary services available for wills, deeds, trusts, and power of attorney documents
Government benefits processing available alongside standard financial services
Multi-state presence across 12 states with consistent service menu
cons: No fee schedule or check cashing rates published on the website — costs are opaque before visiting
No loan products offered, limiting usefulness for consumers needing emergency cash access
No fully online or mobile service — all transactions require a physical branch visit
Check cashing fees are typically higher than the cost of maintaining a bank account with direct deposit
Illinois DMV services are specific to Community Currency Exchange licensing and may not be available in all states
best_for: Unbanked consumers who need to cash checks without a bank account
Illinois residents needing vehicle registration or title transfers outside DMV business hours
Workers with non-standard hours who require 24/7 access to financial services
Consumers sending money internationally who prefer in-person remittance via Ria
diagnosis: PLS Check Cashers is best suited for unbanked or underbanked consumers who need immediate cash access, bill payment, or vehicle-related government services at hours when banks are closed. The main caveat is cost transparency: fee schedules are not published online, and check cashing fees are structurally higher than bank-based alternatives — consumers with an active checking account should compare total costs before switching.
meta_description: Oklahoma City PLS Check Cashers at 7421 S Pennsylvania Ave. 24-hour check cashing services.
